Templates for issues and pull requests, GitHub Actions workflows, Dependabot configuration, and security policy.

## Folders
- **[ISSUE_TEMPLATE](ISSUE_TEMPLATE/README.md)**: Templates for bug reports, feature requests, and configuration for issue reporting in Flask.
- **[workflows](workflows/README.md)**: GitHub Actions workflows for issue locking, publishing, and testing.

## Files
- **[dependabot.yml](dependabot.yml.md)**: Configuration for Dependabot to update GitHub Actions monthly on Mondays at 16:00 UTC.
- **[pull_request_template.md](pull_request_template.md.md)**: A template for pull requests, including guidelines for issue linking, testing, and documentation updates.
- **[SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md.md)**: Security policy for reporting and handling security issues in Pallets projects.
